title: salix incana var. angustifolia
intro: Salix incana var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved willow, is a variety of the Salix incana shrub, a plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salix incana var. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
